prompt_text:
### Demographics: 57-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 3 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Major Depressive Disorder
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Appendicitis (status post appendectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (paternal grandfather)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 72.7 kg; Height 150.7 cm; BMI 32.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 139/90 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.1%; 9 months ago 7.5%; 6 months ago 7.4%; 3 months ago 7.9%; current 8.3%), FPG (12 months ago 187mg/dL; 9 months ago 196mg/dL; 6 months ago 197mg/dL; 3 months ago 203mg/dL; current 172mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 71.9kg; 9 months ago 73.8kg; 6 months ago 71.2kg; 3 months ago 70.8kg; current 72.7kg), Height (12 months ago 150.7cm; 9 months ago 150.7cm; 6 months ago 150.7cm; 3 months ago 150.7cm; current 150.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 31.0kg/m²; current 32.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 143mmHg; 9 months ago 137mmHg; 6 months ago 137mmHg; 3 months ago 139mmHg; current 139mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 87mmHg; 9 months ago 89mmHg; 6 months ago 90mmHg; 3 months ago 90mmHg; current 90mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 33U/L; 9 months ago 24U/L; 6 months ago 24U/L; 3 months ago 25U/L; current 28U/L), AST (12 months ago 30U/L; 9 months ago 30U/L; 6 months ago 30U/L; 3 months ago 23U/L; current 26U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 17mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 16mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 12mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 10mL/min/1.73m²; current 10mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 388mg/g; 9 months ago 398mg/g; 6 months ago 421mg/g; 3 months ago 324mg/g; current 402mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 77mg/dL; 9 months ago 75mg/dL; 6 months ago 78mg/dL; 3 months ago 81mg/dL; current 79mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 38mg/dL; 9 months ago 35mg/dL; 6 months ago 35mg/dL; 3 months ago 37mg/dL; current 36mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 98mg/dL; 9 months ago 95mg/dL; 6 months ago 97mg/dL; 3 months ago 111mg/dL; current 105mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.2g/dL; current 11.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.83 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Poor adherence (estimated 50-70%); SMBG ≤1 time/week; lifestyle control poor.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
